Tip of the day
Equipping a gear set while at a bank will automatically withdraw all the items from the bank.

Tailoring chest

This page contains changes which are not marked for translation.
Tailoring chest
Type: Container
Keyword: Chest

This giant spindle has a lock on it, perhaps you can crack it open and see if it has some useful tailoring items in it!

Tailoring chest is an openable treasury item. It can drop while doing Tailoring activities, and can be obtained from some other sources. These Chests are the only way to obtain some Tailoring based Equipment. They can have the odds of finding them increased with the Chest Finding equipment attribute.

Loot Tables

These are the sub-tables for the various materials, coins, and items that can come from these chests.

These treasury items make 4 independent loot rolls when they are opened.

Main Loot Table

50.010% Per Roll (93.755% Per Chest)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Flax 2-8 10.206% 34.989% ~1 in 3 1 (2-8)
Hemp 5-10 10.206% 34.989% ~1 in 3 0 (0-0)
Basic hide 2-5 9.186% 31.984% ~1 in 3 1 (2-5)
Grass 3-14 8.165% 28.873% ~1 in 3 2 (6-28)
Bamboo logs 2-4 6.124% 22.336% ~1 in 4 4 (8-16)
Tailoring memosphere 1-2 4.082% 15.355% ~1 in 7 0 (0-0)
Bacon weave 1 2.041% 7.917% ~1 in 13 10 (10)

21.640% Per Roll (62.297% Per Chest)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Coins 10-100 20.586% 60.227% ~1 in 2 1 (10-100)
Spider trinket 1 1.054% 4.150% ~1 in 24 150 (150)

(Per Chest) 		Odds Value

Sources

Activity Drops

Activity Name Skills Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.‡
Large sail repair Tailoring lvl. 40 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 47,000 steps 23,500 steps
Small sail repair Tailoring lvl. 20 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 30,000 steps 18,750 steps

‡W.E.A.R is a value that shows the average steps for one item at maximum work efficiency.

Rate 		W.E.A.R.‡
